response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies, but lacks the 15 years of experience explicitly required for this director-level role. Their entrepreneurial and open-source contributions show initiative, but there is limited evidence of deep AI/ML expertise or recognized leadership in AI-powered product development.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Entrepreneurial and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, MCP code generators)
Hands-on experience with cloud technologies and AI-agent infrastructure
concerns: Only ~12 years of professional experience (below the 15-year requirement)
Limited demonstrated expertise in AI/ML or building AI-powered platforms
No advanced degree in an AI-related field
